name: June Alexandrite
fiber: 50% Superwash Merino Wool and 50% Mulberry Silk
alt: Skein of teal and violet yarn that has a shiny quality to it.
moreInfo: Merino wool is ultra soft, creamy to the touch, cloud-like and breathes so you stay comfortable and cozy. We had these spun with a very fine merino wool so it's incredibly soft and wonderful for next-to-skin accessories and garments. Mulberry silk is a dream... it glows and gleams and takes the dye so well, that the colors just pop like crazy. It also contributes to the lovely softness. When you combine these two fibers into a single ply yarn like this, you get subtle differences in tone as the wool and silk take the dye slightly differently. The colors truly appear to be iridescent and other-worldly.

name: Naughty List
fiber: 50% Superwash Merino Wool and 50% Mulberry Silk

name: Dragon Lore
alt: Multi color skein of yarn. Colors included are teal, gold, white, and mulberry.
moreInfo: Camel fiber is super soft, lightweight, and strong with a subtle sheen, while mulberry silk is smooth and strong with a slinky feel that helps the yarn slide nicely on your needles and hooks. When you want to treat yourself, this is the way to go!

name: Belladonna Kiss
alt: A mostly dark purple skein of yarn with some splashes of white and raspberry.
moreInfo: This is our signature sock yarn. It has a ton of memory, or resilience, which is ideal for socks since it stretches but bounces back to its original length. It is perfect for hand-knit socks, but also virtually any other accessory you want to make, like hats, scarves and shawls, mittens, including baby and kid items. Wonderful for sweaters and other garments or even blankets! Sock yarn is so versatile and well-loved by many yarnies.

name: October Opal
fiber: 70% Superwash Merino Wool, 20% Nylon, and 10% Silk
alt: Skein of mostly white and turquoise yarn with some splashes of mint and pink.
moreInfo: This yarn is sumptuous. Ultra-soft and squishy, and sure to be a favorite. Machine-washable, with a hint of dewy glow from the silk and strength and longevity from the nylon. This weight of yarn is thinner than worsted weight and thicker than sport weight. It's incredibly versatile and can knitted or crocheted into an endless number of wonderful items. All types of accessories from head to toe...sweaters are amazzzing... soft, cozy, long-wearing afghans, and loads more. This yarn is ideal for baby items too, due to the softness and ability to be machine-washed.

name: Blackcurrant Beauty
alt: Skein of dark teal and purple yarn.
moreInfo: This is our signature sock yarn. It has a ton of memory, or resilience, which is ideal for socks since it stretches but bounces back to its original length.
